notes: Authored from the HL7 FHIR R4 (4.0.1) RESTful API specification. The fhir-4 adaptor exposes read/search/create/update/delete plus createBundle/addToBundle/uploadBundle (transaction Bundle POST to base). Modelled core resources (Patient, Observation, Encounter, Organization, Practitioner, Condition) that the adaptor's resource builders produce; the real server accepts any FHIR R4 resourceType. servers[0] points at the public HAPI test server as a representative R4 base.
